title: UDS Component Implementation Reference
description: Per-component impl.json file. Powers the Implementation Reference details on the Code tab: example HTML, optional behavior notes, and categorized design-token references.

jsFunc.description: Legacy-compatible behavior function name. Null for current Web Component implementations unless an archived component payload still references a function.

jsFile.description: Legacy-compatible path to the JS file containing jsFunc, relative to uds-docs/. Null for current Web Component implementations.

tokens.description: CSS custom properties the component depends on, grouped by category. Common groups: Color, Font, Space, Border. Each group is an array of token names like '--uds-color-surface-main'.

html.description: The full HTML body shown in the 'Component File' tab and bundled into the ZIP download. Includes <!DOCTYPE>, <head>, <link> tags, and component example markup. Plain string — no template substitution.
